creator: bsduck@mailo.com
text: I can confirm the problem. Until recently, LibreOffice followed the system theme out of the box on both KDE Plasma and LXQt. KF5 integration has never been necessary, the default Qt5 option is fine. Now, on both LXQt 2.0 (Qt6) and Plasma 5.27.11 (Qt5), it doesn't load the Qt5 interface by default anymore but the old "X11" one, unless you set SAL_USE_VCLPLUGIN=qt5. Maybe upstream deprecated the Qt5 interface in favour of the Qt6 one?
